About Us

India's Best Scalping & Trading Institute — BullScalpix

Welcome to BullScalpix, Raipur's most trusted stock market trading institute. We specialize in precision scalping, intraday strategies, and options trading education for aspiring traders across India. As the best trading institute in Chhattisgarh, we provide cutting-edge training on scalping techniques, price action analysis, and risk management designed for live market conditions.


At BullScalpix, we believe in "Signals With Reasoning" — every call comes with the full logic behind it, so you learn to think like a trader, not just follow tips. Our expert team led by Vinod Kumar Baghel brings years of live market experience to your learning journey. Whether you're a beginner or an experienced trader looking to go full-time, BullScalpix is your one-stop solution.


  • Live BankNifty & Nifty scalping signals every trading day
  • One Year mentorship support after course completion
  • Real trades, real results — transparent track record
  • Active community of 500+ traders on Telegram & WhatsApp
  • Structured programmes for all levels — beginner to advanced

Journey of a Student

How Does It Work

1
🎯
Make a Decision
Decide to become a financially independent, disciplined trader. The first step is the most important one.
2
📚
Subscribe to a Programme
Choose from Scalping & Intraday Pro, Investment & Options Golden Strategy, or Trading Fundamentals. Enroll and get instant access.
3
🖥️
Learn & Practice
Attend live sessions on Zoom, access recordings anytime, and get mentor support throughout your journey.
4
🏆
Become a Pro Trader
Apply strategies in live markets, track your progress, and evolve from novice to professional trader.
Who Is This For

BullScalpix Is For You — Whoever You Are

  • 💼
    Working Professionals
    Working professionals who want to generate a second income or build financial independence. Our signals are fast, precise, and actionable in minutes.
  • 🏠
    Housewives
    Our easy-to-follow signals and structured courses teach housewives how to identify investment opportunities and generate passive income from home.
  • 🏭
    Businessmen
    Business owners learn financial analysis, capital allocation, and risk management to grow their wealth through smart trading.
  • 🎓
    Students
    Students learn high-income trading skills early, building a foundation for financial independence from day one in their career.
  • 📈
    Full-Time Traders
    Already trading but struggling for consistency? Our advanced scalping frameworks and mentorship plug the gaps in your strategy.
